title: ecbolium quadifarium
intro: Ecbolium quadifarium, also known as the Four-leaved Ecbolium, is a flowering plant species in the family Acanthaceae. It is traditionally used in various herbal remedies due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ecbolium quadifarium include reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and supporting the immune system. Ecbolium quadifarium can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
